items.name: Bronze Dagger
items.blurb: Short and honest — a rogue's first friend.

items.name: Sling of Pebbles
items.blurb: River stones with ambition.

items.name: Padded Coif
items.blurb: Quilted cloth against cold and clubs.

items.name: Traveler's Cloak
items.blurb: Mud-colored wool that smells of campfire.

items.name: Iron Greaves
items.blurb: Clanky, warm, reliable.

items.name: Work Gauntlets
items.blurb: Forge-stained leather.

items.name: Round Buckler
items.blurb: A disc of pine banded in iron.

items.name: Herb Pouch
items.blurb: Dried mint and woundwort.

items.name: Forage Roots
items.blurb: Bitter bulbs that sweeten in stew.

items.name: Smoked Venison
items.blurb: Trail meat from Misty Hills.

items.name: Stamina Tea
items.blurb: Bitter green brew for long marches.

items.name: Coil of Rope
items.blurb: Fifty feet of hold-spun hemp.

items.name: Moonsteel Saber
items.blurb: Edges that drink moonlight.

items.name: Storm Javelin
items.blurb: Throws like thunder remembers.

items.name: Warden's Helm
items.blurb: Visor etched with raven-marks.

items.name: Pack-Leather Cuirass
items.blurb: Soft armor that flexes with the hunt.

items.name: Ember Gauntlets
items.blurb: Heat without burn — Hold of Embers craft.

items.name: Mist-Strider Greaves
items.blurb: Steps that leave no name for fog to steal.

items.name: Serpent Buckler
items.blurb: A coil of dusk-steel. Whispers when raised.

items.name: Ring of Oaths
items.blurb: Warm when you keep your word.

items.name: Fang Amulet
items.blurb: Ulfric's token — kinship made metal.

items.name: Ash Philter
items.blurb: One sip steadies the hand for cruel choices.

items.name: Greater Healing Potion
items.blurb: Deep red of mountain orchids.

items.name: Greater Mana Draught
items.blurb: Starlight corked in glass.

items.name: Dragon Scale Shard
items.blurb: Shed whisper-scale — forge fuel or Nyx bait.

items.name: Bow of Three Names
items.blurb: Stringed for Justin, Rusty, Elisha — arrows that find friends' foes.

items.name: Staff of Ley-Hounds
items.blurb: Arcane wood that hums when Lumen howls.

items.name: Helm of the Soft Path
items.blurb: Moss grows in the creases. Wild law made wearable.

items.name: Plate of the Hearth
items.blurb: Armor that warms allies within a step.

items.name: Gauntlets of Unmaking
items.blurb: Fingers that unlace oaths and armor alike.

items.name: Greaves of the Maw
items.blurb: Walk the World-Eater's teeth without slipping.

items.name: Shield of Remembered Names
items.blurb: Corv's census beaten into bronze.

items.name: Ring of the Chronicle
items.blurb: Three bands braided — one for each walker.

items.name: Serpent Crown Shard
items.blurb: A splinter of Nyx's ambition. Cuts kindly.

items.name: Elixir of Destiny
items.blurb: One dose before the finale — clears the throat for the last choice.
